basic_details.organization_name: Employees State Insurance Corporation Faridabad (ESIC Faridabad)
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation Faridabad (ESIC Faridabad) has released the official Embryologist (Scientist Gr-I) Recruitment 2026 notification on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the ESIC Faridabad Embryologist (Scientist Gr-I) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Postgraduate Degree in Clinical Embryology, Ph.D. in Clinical Embryology/Assisted Reproductive Technology/Fertility, MBBS with PG Degree in Clinical Embryology, or relevant Life Sciences/Biotechnology qualification with required ART experience and aged up to 40 years can attend the w

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in Clinical Embryology with 3 years ART lab experience OR Ph.D in Clinical Embryology/assisted reproductive technology/fertility with 1 year ART lab experience OR Medical graduate (MBBS) with post-graduate degree in Clinical Embryology with 2 years ART lab experience OR Post-graduate in life sciences/Biotechnology with 1 year clinical embryology certified training and 4 years experience in ART.
qualification.details: Postgraduate in Clinical Embryology (graduated Full-time programme with a minimum of four semesters) from a recognized university with additional three years of human ART laboratory experience in handling human gametes and embryos. Ph.D holder full-time Ph.D, project shall be related to Clinical Embryology or assisted reproductive technology or fertility) from a recognised university with an additional one year of human ART laboratory experience in handling human gametes and embryos. Medical graduate(MBBS) with a post-graduate degree in Clinical Embryology(Full time proram) form a recognised Univeristy with additional two year of ART laboratory experience in handling human gametes and embryos. Post-graduate in life sciences or Biotechnology with a minimum of one year of on-site, full time clinical embryology certified training in addition to four years experience in handling human gametes and embryos in a registered ART level 2 clinic.

salary_details.details: Grade Pay Rs 5400 (Level 10) with applicable allowances. A Demand Draft of ₹20,000 in favour of “ESI Fund A/c No.1", payable at Faridabad is required.

selection_process: Based on academic credentials and interview performance. Results will be posted on: www.esic.gov.in Offer of appointment via email. Joining as per instructions in appointment letter.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Faridabad Embryologist (Scientist Gr-I) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Faridabad Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Faridabad Embryologist (Scientist Gr-I) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Faridabad Embryologist (Scientist Gr-I) Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
ESIC Faridabad Embryologist (Scientist Gr-I) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Postgraduate in Clinical Embryology (graduated Full-time programme with a minimum of four semesters) from a recognized university with additional three years of human ART laboratory experience in handling human gametes and embryos. Ph.D holder full-time Ph.D, project shall be related to Clinical Embryology or assisted reproductive technology or fertility) from a recognised university with an additional one year of human ART laboratory experience in handling human gametes and embryos. Medical graduate(MBBS) with a post-graduate degree in Clinical Embryology(Full time proram) form a recognised Univeristy with additional two year of ART laboratory experience in handling human gametes and embryos. Post-graduate in life sciences or Biotechnology with a minimum of one year of on-site, full time clinical embryology certified training in addition to four years experience in handling human gametes and embryos in a registered ART level 2 clinic.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Faridabad Embryologist (Scientist Gr-I) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Faridabad Embryologist (Scientist Gr-I) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Faridabad?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Embryologist (Scientist Gr-I) post at ESIC Faridabad is scheduled for 16th July 2026. Candidates should report between 09:00 AM and 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Embryologist post?
faq.answer: The qualification includes a Postgraduate in Clinical Embryology with 3 years ART lab experience, or a Ph.D. in Clinical Embryology with 1 year ART lab experience, or an MBBS with a postgraduate degree in Clinical Embryology and 2 years ART lab experience, or a Postgraduate in life sciences/Biotechnology with 1 year certified training and 4 years ART experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Embryologist (Scientist Gr-I) position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Embryologist (Scientist Gr-I) post?
faq.answer: The salary is based on Grade Pay Rs 5400 (Level 10) with applicable allowances. Additionally, a Demand Draft of ₹20,000 is required.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Embryologist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Embryologist (Scientist Gr-I) post at ESIC Faridabad.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹500 for UR/OBC/EWS categories, while it is Nil for SC/ST/PwD/Women candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ESIC Faridabad Embryologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on academic credentials and interview performance. Results will be posted on www.esic.gov.in, and offers will be sent via email.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Employees State Insurance Corporation Faridabad (ESIC Faridabad) office. The specific address is Faridabad, Haryana, 121001.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at ESIC Faridabad.
